steps.title: Find the plural subject
steps.content: The subject is The trailblazing accomplishments of Goldin. Its head noun is the plural accomplishments, and the phrase of Goldin does not change the number of the subject.

steps.title: Match the plural verb
steps.content: Choice A uses a singular present verb. Choice B uses the singular auxiliary has, and Choice C uses the singular auxiliary is. The sentence needs a plural present-tense verb to agree with accomplishments. The answer is D.
